title: Poor's Vanilla+ Modpack
description: A modpack that aims to make vanilla more fun than normal.
body:
PoorsвЂ‹вЂЌвЂ‹вЂЊвЂЌвЂ‹вЂЌвЂЊвЂ‹вЂЌвЂ‹вЂЊвЂЌвЂ‹вЂЌвЂЊ Vanilla+ is a modpack that aims to make Minecraft work better, more fun, and more engaging without compromising the original game's charm.

рџЊџ Core Features

рџ‘‹ Immersive First-Person Animations

Completely different Perspective on Minecraft. Your arms are now visible, and they swing naturally when you mine, fight, and build. Every action is now done with fluid, lifelike motion, which undoubtedly brings you closer to your world.

рџ§Ќ New Player Animations

The character you control will be more lifelike than ever as they will exhibit smoother walking, running, and fighting animations that will make you feel alive, whether you are in the first or third person.

рџ§џ Livelier Mobs with Fresh Animation Packs

Each and every mob has its own quirks! Completely redone animations allow the creatures to move, idle, and even interact with you in a totally believable manner, thus making both your journeys and fights more exciting and fun.

рџљЂ Optimized Performance

Your experience with the game will be less of a headache as it will be faster to load, you will have higher FPS, and chunk rendering will be smoother, thus making lagged kill runs a thing of the past. Poors Vanilla+ is a microlight version and is performance-focused for all kinds of hardware.

вњЁ Enhanced Visual Effects

World gets a little glow-up through various subtle improvements to the particle system, smoother lighting, and the use of refined visuals, no need for shader packs.

рџђґ Stronger, Faster Horses

Take your trip to the next level with upgraded horse stats and behavior. At long last, there are mounts that really are worth taming and riding wherever your adventures take you.

рџђ‰ Harder, More Strategic Ender Dragon Fight

The battle at the end is definitely not a walk in the park. Be ready for a real test of dexterity, stamina, and preparation once youвЂ™re out in the End.

рџ—єпёЏ Vanilla-Style Minimap

It is very easy to find your way around by means of a neat, unassuming minimap that fits in perfectly with the vanilla interface. It is useful, yet it does not allow you to get completely absorbed.

рџ”® Custom Enchantments

With the new, balanced enchantments that facilitate combat, utility, and exploration while conforming to Minecraft's design, you can now broaden your magical arsenal.

рџ’ј Keep Some Inventory on Death

Death may be hard, but only to a certain extent. Remember that you will be allowed to keep your most important tools and necessities while giving up the non-critical items hence, survival will remain challenging yet somewhat forgiving.

рџЏ† New Achievements & Advancements

New milestones can be earned, which would be a great source of motivation, and these will reward oneвЂ™s exploration, creativity, and skillful usage of the various systems in Minecraft. There is always something new to ground for.

рџЊЊ A World That Feels Alive

This modpack is a Minecraft vanilla+ overhaul.

Whatever it is that you are doing, building, exploring, or surviving the night, everything is looking much smoother, feeling tighter, and playing significantly вЂ‹вЂЌвЂ‹вЂЊвЂЌвЂ‹вЂЌвЂЊвЂ‹вЂЌвЂ‹вЂЊвЂЌвЂ‹вЂЌвЂЊbetter.
